title: French bitcoin evangelical Eric Larchevêque wants his right-wing voice to be part of public debate
subhead: Known to the public as a judge on a television show, the French bitcoin pioneer wants to win over the masses to the cryptocurrencies that made him wealthy. With the 2027 presidential election approaching, this libertarian has embraced increasingly radical ideas.

title: Soaring ammunition cost turns Iran conflict into 'war of stockpiles'
Former FBI director Robert Mueller, who investigated Russia-Trump campaign ties, dies
Iran missile strikes wound over 100 in two southern Israel towns
subhead: Iran retaliated after its main nuclear enrichment site was hit, striking two southern Israeli cities, Dimona and Arad, late Saturday evening. It is the first time that Israel's nuclear research center has been targeted in the fighting.

title: The UAE is reorganizing its arms supply network for Sudanese paramilitaries
subhead: Abu Dhabi is seeking to develop new logistical routes from Sudan's neighboring countries, such as Ethiopia and the Central African Republic, to support the Rapid Support Forces.

title: The truffle epidemic: 'I'm worried we'll soon have truffle shampoo'
subhead: The rise – and imminent fall – of the truffle, a once rare luxury ingredient whose proliferation is now reaching saturation point.

title: International aid convoy reaches Cuba amid humanitarian crisis
subhead: More than 500 worldwide activists have arrived in Havana to deliver to the Cuban authorities roughly 20 metric tons of food supplies, medical equipment.

subhead: Since stripping Senegal of the continental championship title, ruling the team had 'forfeited,' the Confédération Africaine de Football (CAF) has faced intense criticism over its ability to manage competitions.

title: Bertrand Badie, political scientist: 'Persian culture is an impetuous alliance of dignity and fury'
subhead: The international relations specialist, who is of Iranian descent on his father's side, speaks with Le Monde about the West's lack of understanding of Iran and its culture.
